DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative or have faults provided associated equipment is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: The door 1L flight attendant switch panel MANUAL indication and the manual mode indication for entry doors 1L, 1R, 2L and 2R will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 52-11-07-01.
The forward cargo door lift/latch system (electric mode) will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 52-34-01.
The forward cargo door control panel lights will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 52-34-02.

The door indication systems for the forward cargo door, forward access door, flight deck overhead door, forward electrical equipment access door, and entry doors 1L, 1R, 2L and 2R will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 52-71-01.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative or have faults provided associated equipment is considered inoperative.

Note.Para: The door 1L flight attendant switch panel MANUAL indication and the manual mode indication for entry doors 3L, 3R, 4L and 4R will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 52-11-07-01.
The aft cargo door lift/latch system (electric mode) will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 52-35-01.
The aft cargo door control panel lights will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 52-35-02.

The door indication systems for the aft cargo door, aft electrical equipment access door, bulk cargo door, and entry doors 3L, 3R, 4L and 4R will be inoperative. The airplane must also be dispatched using MEL item 52-71-01.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One power source for each PSDC may be inoperative.
One databus for each PSDC may be inoperative.
One databus for each PSDC may be inoperative provided each inoperative databus is verified to be connected to the remote data concentrator (RDC) in position 19.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify that the inoperative databus on PSDC 2, PSDC 3, PSDC 4 and PSDC 5 is connected to RDC 19 (AMM DDG 32-08-01).
For an inoperative databus on PSDC 2, verify that the main and nose landing gear control sensors on SYS 1 are not all blank on LANDING GEAR CONTROL maintenance page 1.
For an inoperative databus on PSDC 3, verify that the main and nose landing gear indication sensors on SYS 2 are not all blank on the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRNG maintenance page.
For an inoperative databus on PSDC 4, verify that the main and nose landing gear indication sensors on SYS 1 are not all blank on the LNDG GEAR INDN AND STRNG maintenance page.
For an inoperative databus on PSDC 5, verify that the main and nose landing gear control sensors on SYS 2 are not all blank on LANDING GEAR CONTROL maintenance page 1.
